splits.title: Relief Society Conference
splits.author: Julia A. F. Lund
splits.start_boundary: Relief Society Conference By Julia A. F. Lund, General
splits.end_boundary: will appear in a later issue of the Magazine.

files.notes: This is a single comprehensive article covering the entire Relief Society Conference proceedings. It includes multiple speakers and sessions but is presented as one unified conference report by Julia A. F. Lund as General Secretary. The content flows continuously from the opening description through all the various speakers' presentations to the closing remarks.

files.notes: This is a single comprehensive lesson department article containing multiple lesson sections: Theology and Testimony, Teachers' Topic, Literature (Russia), and Social Service. All sections are part of one unified lesson department article, not separate articles.
